text: I am the Evolution Scholar of Sejor. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Celestial Titan into Infernal Hydra.
I can evolve Infernal Hydra into Lunar Owlbear.
I can evolve Void Titan into Storm Serpent.
I can evolve Storm Serpent into Void Griffin.
I can evolve Arcane Manticore into Shadow Drake.
I can evolve Shadow Drake into Wild Chimera.
I can evolve Mystic Minotaur into Thunder Owlbear.
I can evolve Thunder Owlbear into Frozen Basilisk.
I can evolve Arcane Djinn into Lunar Kraken.
I can evolve Lunar Kraken into Storm Hydra.
I can evolve Solar Chimera into Ancient Hydra.
I can evolve Ancient Hydra into Ancient Leviathan.
I can evolve Astral Djinn into Solar Drake.
I can evolve Solar Drake into Arcane Manticore.
I can evolve Shadow Serpent into Arcane Owlbear.
I can evolve Arcane Owlbear into Wild Titan.
I can evolve Storm Wolf into Wild Minotaur.
I can evolve Wild Minotaur into Celestial Drake.
I can evolve Storm Wolf into Thunder Kraken.
I can evolve Thunder Kraken into Wild Phoenix.
I can evolve Crystal Minotaur into Solar Kraken.
I can evolve Solar Kraken into Infernal Hydra.
I can evolve Ancient Kraken into Ancient Wolf.

I can evolve Ancient Kraken into Solar Griffin.
I can evolve Solar Griffin into Shadow Leviathan.
I can evolve Ancient Cyclops into Storm Serpent.

I can evolve Ancient Griffin into Ancient Golem.
I can evolve Ancient Golem into Arcane Owlbear.
I can evolve Astral Griffin into Frozen Manticore.

I can evolve Solar Kraken into Thunder Djinn.
I can evolve Shadow Tiger into Thunder Drake.
I can evolve Thunder Drake into Lunar Kraken.
I can evolve Crystal Basilisk into Void Tiger.
I can evolve Void Tiger into Arcane Kraken.
I can evolve Ancient Griffin into Wild Manticore.
I can evolve Wild Manticore into Astral Wyvern.
I can evolve Celestial Drake into Arcane Titan.
I can evolve Arcane Titan into Ancient Owlbear.
I can evolve Solar Leviathan into Shadow Wyvern.
I can evolve Shadow Wyvern into Frozen Owlbear.
I can evolve Frozen Wolf into Wild Phoenix.
I can evolve Wild Phoenix into Ancient Phoenix.
I can evolve Lunar Wyvern into Frozen Owlbear.
I can evolve Frozen Owlbear into Ancient Djinn.
I can evolve Thunder Serpent into Void Hydra.
I can evolve Void Hydra into Frozen Leviathan.
I can evolve Thunder Griffin into Wild Leviathan.
I can evolve Wild Leviathan into Storm Tiger.
I can evolve Infernal Minotaur into Solar Phoenix.
I can evolve Solar Phoenix into Solar Basilisk.
I can evolve Shadow Griffin into Arcane Drake.
I can evolve Arcane Drake into Lunar Wolf.
I can evolve Storm Wyvern into Void Owlbear.
I can evolve Void Owlbear into Arcane Leviathan.
I can evolve Lunar Griffin into Void Owlbear.
I can evolve Void Owlbear into Ancient Hydra.
Choose a beast evolution.
